appraisal_events.evidence: « Je ne sais pas pourquoi il me salue puisqu'il ne me connaît pas. Aussi je ne lui ai pas rendu son salut. » ... « Je l'aurais parié que c'était un youpin. C'est bien leur genre de faire les punaises. »
appraisal_events.explanation: Albertine refuses to return Bloch’s greeting and disparages him with insulting, anti-Semitic language. The narrator reports this and later characterizes the 'petite bande' as hard and coarse, suggesting critical distance.

status_effects.explanation: Her rudeness and prejudiced remarks lower her local estimation in the narrated framing, despite other charms noted elsewhere in the passage.
He suffers a public social rebuff when Albertine withholds a return greeting and denigrates him, locally excluding him from her circle.
